samples.text: If soil is watered, seeds can germinate. The soil was watered. Can seeds germinate?
Seeds are able to sprout when the soil receives water. Water was added to the soil. Is germination possible?
If earth is irrigated, seedlings can sprout. The earth was irrigated. Can seedlings sprout?
Germination requires moisture in the soil. The soil currently has moisture because it was watered. Can germination occur?
If soil is watered, seeds can germinate. The soil was watered. The seeds were planted last week. Can seeds germinate?
